prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
This page contains the END of "Item 9B. Other Information". The next section is "Item 15. Exhibits, Financial Statement Schedules".
Transcribe VERBATIM the last 5 lines of "Item 9B" body text before the next item begins:
if the "Item 15" heading appears on this page, take the 5 lines just before it; otherwise Item 9B continues to the bottom, so take the last 5 lines of the page. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
ITEM 14. Principal Accountant Fees and Services

Information concerning accountant fees and services will be contained in our Proxy Statement to be issued in connection with our Annual
Meeting of Stockholders scheduled to be held on October 7, 2025 and is incorporated herein by reference.
